name: Id
description: Unique Salesforce record identifier (18-char). Maps to the external item ID in the Graph connection. Not displayed to users directly.

name: Url
description: Direct URL to open the record in Salesforce. Enables deep-linking from search results and Copilot cards.

name: IconUrl
description: URL to the object-type icon asset displayed on search result cards (e.g. Account icon, Case icon).

name: ObjectName
description: CRM object type name (Account, Contact, Lead, Opportunity, Case). Used as the primary entity-type filter and for the itemType semantic label.

name: Type
description: Record sub-classification within an object (e.g. 'Customer', 'Partner' for Account; 'Problem', 'Question' for Case). Null for Lead and Contact.

name: Source
description: Marketing/lead attribution source indicating how the record entered the pipeline (e.g. 'Web', 'Phone Inquiry', 'Partner Referral'). Merges AccountSource, LeadSource, and Origin.

name: Number
description: The number assigned to an Account or Case. For Account this is the customer/vendor AccountNumber; for Case this is the auto-generated CaseNumber. Contains null if the record is not an Account or Case.

name: Name
description: Primary display name of the record (e.g. account company name, contact full name, opportunity deal name, case subject). Mapped to the 'title' semantic label for search result rendering.

name: Owner
description: The user who owns this record, resolved as a Principal type carrying both display name and profile URL. Enables queries like 'show my leads' or 'leads owned by Alice'.

name: CreatedBy
description: The user who created this record, resolved as a Principal type. Semantic label 'createdBy' enables platform-native 'created by' filtering in Microsoft Search.

name: CreatedDate
description: Timestamp when the record was created. Enables time-based queries like 'cases opened this week' or 'leads created last month'. Semantic label 'createdDateTime'.

name: LastModifiedBy
description: The user who last modified this record, resolved as a Principal type. Semantic label 'lastModifiedBy' for platform audit features.

name: LastModifiedDate
description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to the record. Enables recency-based queries like 'recently updated opportunities'. Semantic label 'lastModifiedDateTime'.

name: AccountName
description: Name of the related Account record. For Lead, only populated after conversion (null for unconverted leads). Enables queries like 'find contacts at Acme Corp'.

name: AccountId
description: Salesforce ID of the related Account record. Enables relationship traversal across objects. For Lead, only populated after conversion (null for unconverted leads).

name: ContactName
description: Full contact name. For Contact and Lead, computed from Salutation + FirstName + LastName. For Opportunity and Case, the related Contact's name. Null for Account.

name: ContactId
description: Salesforce ID of the related Contact record. For Lead, maps from ConvertedContactId (null for unconverted leads). Null for Account and Contact itself. Enables cross-object relationship traversal.

name: ContactDetails
description: Consolidated contact details (phone, email, fax) as a single JSON string. Contact has work/home/other/mobile/assistant phones + fax + email; Lead has work/mobile/fax + email; Account has phone + fax.

name: Email
description: Primary email address. Queryable for exact-match lookups like 'find lead with email X'. Also present in the ContactDetails JSON for keyword discovery. Null for Account and Opportunity.

name: Address
description: Consolidated address as JSON string. Account: billing + shipping. Contact: mailing + other. Lead: single address. Preserves type label (billing/shipping/mailing/other) within one property slot.

name: Status
description: Lifecycle status of the record (e.g. 'Open', 'Closed Won', 'Qualified'). For Opportunity this is StageName (also duplicated to Opp-specific Stage). Null for Account and Contact.

name: IsClosed
description: Boolean indicating the record has reached a terminal state (closed case, closed opp, converted lead). For Lead, maps from IsConverted. Null for Account and Contact.

name: LastActivityDate
description: Date of the most recent logged activity (call, email, task) on the record. Useful for detecting stale records (e.g. 'accounts with no activity in 90 days'). Null for Case.

name: Industry
description: Industry classification picklist (e.g. 'Technology', 'Healthcare', 'Finance'). Only populated for Account and Lead. Enables queries like 'show tech industry accounts'.

name: Rating
description: Engagement rating picklist (Hot, Warm, Cold). Same picklist on both Account and Lead. Null for Contact, Opportunity, and Case.

name: Website
description: Company website URL. Only populated for Account and Lead. Null for Contact, Opportunity, and Case.

name: AnnualRevenue
description: Annual revenue of the company, normalized to the org's base currency. Only populated for Account and Lead. Base currency must be specified in the Copilot description during Connector setup.

name: NumberOfEmployees
description: Number of employees at the company. Only populated for Account and Lead.

name: ParentId
description: Foreign key to the parent record. Account links to parent Account; Case links to parent Case. The 'itemParentId' semantic label enables platform hierarchy navigation.

name: ParentName
description: Display name of the parent record. For Account this is the parent account name; for Case it's the parent case number. Denormalized for display without additional lookups.

name: ParentUrl
description: URL deep link to the parent record in Salesforce. Null when no parent relationship exists.

name: ClosedDate
description: Date the record was closed or converted. For Opportunity this is CloseDate; for Lead it's ConvertedDate; for Case it's ClosedDate. Null for Account and Contact.

name: Ownership
description: Ownership structure picklist (Public, Private, Subsidiary, Other).

name: TickerSymbol
description: Stock market ticker symbol (e.g. 'MSFT', 'AAPL'). Only relevant for publicly traded companies.

name: SicCode
description: Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) code for industry categorization. Complements the Industry picklist for more granular classification.

name: Site
description: Location descriptor label for the account (e.g. 'HQ', 'Branch', 'Regional Office'). Not the website URL — purely an organizational location label.

name: JobTitle
description: Job title of the contact or lead (e.g. 'VP of Engineering', 'CTO'). Free-text with inconsistent values. Searchable-only — better for keyword discovery than KQL filtering.

name: Department
description: Department the contact belongs to (e.g. 'Engineering', 'Sales', 'Marketing'). Free-text field with inconsistent entries — better suited as searchable rather than queryable.

name: Birthdate
description: Contact's date of birth. PII-sensitive — some organizations may choose not to index this field.

name: AssistantName
description: Name of the contact's administrative assistant.

name: ReportsTo
description: Name of the contact's manager/supervisor, denormalized from the ReportsTo relationship. Enables hierarchical queries like 'who does X report to'.

name: ReportsToId
description: Salesforce ID of the contact's manager/supervisor. Enables hierarchy traversal for queries like 'find all contacts reporting to X'.

name: ConvertedDate
description: Date when the lead was converted to a Contact + Account + Opportunity. Null for unconverted leads.

name: ConvertedOpportunityName
description: Name of the Opportunity record created during lead conversion. Denormalized from ConvertedOpportunityId for human-readable display. Null if no Opportunity was created.

name: ConvertedOpportunityId
description: Salesforce ID of the Opportunity record created during lead conversion. Enables relationship traversal to the converted opportunity. Null if no Opportunity was created.

name: Company
description: Company or organization name for the lead. Free-text field populated before conversion. After conversion, the Account name is available via common AccountName.

name: Stage
description: Opportunity pipeline stage (e.g. 'Prospecting', 'Negotiation', 'Closed Won'). Intentionally duplicates common Status because Stage is the primary CRM concept for opportunities.

name: Amount
description: Deal monetary value. Key pipeline metric for revenue-based queries (e.g. 'opportunities over $100K'). Normalised to the org base currency (specify in connection description).

name: Probability
description: Estimated probability of winning the deal as a percentage (0-100). Often auto-populated based on Stage in many Salesforce orgs.

name: ExpectedRevenue
description: Weighted expected revenue (Amount × Probability). Computed by Salesforce; normalised to the org base currency (specify in connection description).

name: NextStep
description: Free-text field describing the next planned action or milestone for this deal.

name: IsWon
description: Boolean flag indicating whether the opportunity was won. Combined with IsClosed distinguishes between 'Closed Won' and 'Closed Lost'.

name: ForecastCategory
description: Sales forecast category bucket (Pipeline, Best Case, Commit, Closed). Key field for sales forecasting roll-ups and pipeline reviews.

name: FiscalQuarter
description: Fiscal quarter number (1-4) computed by Salesforce based on CloseDate and the org's fiscal year settings.

name: FiscalYear
description: Fiscal year number computed by Salesforce based on CloseDate and the org's fiscal year settings.

name: Fiscal
description: Human-readable fiscal period label combining year and quarter (e.g. '2026 Q2'). Convenience property for display.

name: Subject
description: Case subject line / headline summarizing the issue. Primary textual identifier beyond the auto-numbered CaseNumber.

name: Priority
description: Case priority picklist (High, Medium, Low, Critical). Key triage filter for support workflows — 'show high priority cases'. Semantic label 'priority'.

name: Reason
description: Root cause category picklist (e.g. 'Installation', 'Performance', 'User Error').

name: IsEscalated
description: Boolean flag indicating the case has been escalated. Useful for identifying and filtering escalated support issues.

name: InternalComments
description: Internal agent-facing comments and case notes. Mapped to CONTENT for semantic search alongside the Description field.

name: SuppliedEmail
description: Email address submitted through Web-to-Case or Email-to-Case. May differ from the linked Contact's email for unlinked cases.

name: LifecycleState
description: Normalised lifecycle state across all CRM objects: Open, Closed, or Converted. Computed from StageName (Opp), IsClosed (Case), IsConverted (Lead), or Status (Task).

name: OpportunityOutcome
description: Three-way outcome for Opportunity records: 'Won' (Closed Won), 'Lost' (Closed Lost), or 'InProgress' (any other stage). Computed at ingestion.

name: CaseProduct
description: The product associated with this support case (e.g. 'GC1020', 'GC3060', 'GC5040', 'GC5060'). Custom Salesforce field. Useful for queries like 'cases on GC5060 products'.

name: SLAViolation
description: Whether the SLA was violated on this case. Useful for support escalation and SLA reporting queries.

name: PotentialLiability
description: Whether this case has potential legal or financial liability flagged. Custom Salesforce field used for risk and compliance queries.

name: CampaignStatus
description: Marketing campaign status (e.g. 'Planned', 'In Progress', 'Completed'). Salesforce Campaign Status field, distinct from the generic Status property to avoid object-type collision.

name: BudgetedCost
description: Planned budget for the campaign in the org's base currency. Used for campaign budget queries.

name: CampaignStartDate
description: Start date of the marketing campaign. Refinable for date-range facets.

name: NumberOfOpportunities
description: Total opportunities sourced from this campaign.

name: NumberOfWonOpportunities
description: Won opportunities sourced from this campaign — campaign ROI signal.

name: DueDate
description: Due date for the Task. Refinable for date-range facets like 'tasks due this week'.

name: IsAllDayEvent
description: Whether this Event spans the full day or has specific start/end times.

name: RelatedToId
description: ID of the record this Task/Event/FeedItem/CaseComment relates to — typically an Opportunity, Account, or Case (Salesforce 'WhatId').

name: RelatedPersonId
description: ID of the person this Task/Event relates to — typically a Contact or Lead (Salesforce 'WhoId').

name: LeadId
description: ID of the Lead associated with this CampaignMember.

name: MemberStatus
description: Engagement status of a CampaignMember (e.g. 'Sent', 'Responded', 'Registered').

name: OpportunityId
description: ID of the Opportunity this OpportunityLineItem or Quote belongs to.

name: OrderId
description: ID of the Order this OrderItem belongs to.

name: QuoteId
description: ID of the Quote this QuoteLineItem belongs to.

name: Product2Id
description: ID of the Product associated with this line item, order item, or quote line item.

name: Quantity
description: Quantity on the OpportunityLineItem, OrderItem, or QuoteLineItem.

name: TotalPrice
description: Total price on a line item (Quantity x UnitPrice).

name: IsPublished
description: Whether the CaseComment is visible to the customer (true) or internal-only (false).

name: EffectiveDate
description: Effective date of an Order. Refinable for date-range filtering.

name: ExpirationDate
description: Expiration date of a Quote. Refinable for date-range filtering.

name: Authors
description: All people who participated in the record — typically the creator and last modifier. Resolved as a PrincipalCollection for accurate people-based search.
